heading: Direction for establishment; publication in Federal Register; continuing acquisition of lands
label: 460u–2 Direction for establishment; publication in Federal Register; continuing acquisition of lands
text: As soon as practicable after , and following the acquisition by the Secretary of an acreage within the boundaries of the area described in which in his opinion is efficiently administrable for the purposes of this subchapter, he shall establish the Indiana Dunes National Park by publication of notice thereof in the Federal Register. By no later than , the Secretary shall publish in the Federal Register a detailed description of the boundaries of the Park and shall from time to time so publish any additional boundary changes as may occur. Following such establishment and subject to the limitations and conditions prescribed in , the Secretary may continue to acquire lands and interests in lands for the Park.November 5, 1966October 1, 1977section 460u of this titlesection 460u of this title
notes: Amendments2019— substituted “National Park” for “National Lakeshore” and “Park” for “lakeshore” in two places.Pub. L. 116–61976— inserted provision requiring the Secretary to publish in the Federal Register, no later than , the boundaries of the lakeshore and from time to time publish any additional changes in the boundaries as they occur.Pub. L. 94–549October 1, 1977
